mapper.select: SELECT d.day_id, d.day_number, DATE_FORMAT(d.trip_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS trip_date, d.memo AS day_memo, i.item_id, i.visit_order, i.start_time, i.end_time, i.memo, p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name FROM trip_day d LEFT JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id LEFT JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id WHERE d.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY d.day_number ASC, i.visit_order ASC

SELECT trip_place_id, member_id, api_place_id, place_name, address, latitude, longitude, category_name, place_url FROM trip_place WHERE (member_id IS NULL OR member_id = #{currentMemberId})
AND place_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND category_name = #{category}
ORDER BY CASE WHEN member_id = #{currentMemberId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, -- 내 장소 우선 place_name LIMIT 30

SELECT DISTINCT p.trip_place_id, p.place_name, p.latitude, p.longitude, p.category_name, p.address FROM trip t JOIN trip_day d ON d.trip_id = t.trip_id JOIN itinerary_item i ON i.day_id = d.day_id JOIN trip_place p ON p.trip_place_id = i.trip_place_id WHERE t.trip_id = #{tripId} AND t.is_public = 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(e.amount), 0) AS totalAmount, COALESCE(SUM(e.amount) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT m.member_id), 0), 0) AS avgPerPerson FROM expense e JOIN trip_member m ON m.trip_id = e.trip_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND m.invitation_status = 'ACCEPTED'
SELECT category, SUM(amount) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS count FROM expense WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} GROUP BY category ORDER BY totalAmount DESC

SELECT e.expense_id, e.description, e.amount, e.category, DATE_FORMAT(e.expense_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expenseDate, e.payment_type, m.nickname AS payerNickname, ep.share_amount, ep.is_settled FROM expense e JOIN member m ON m.member_id = e.payer_id JOIN expense_participant ep ON ep.expense_id = e.expense_id WHERE e.trip_id = #{tripId} AND ep.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY e.expense_date DESC
